item.title: Welcome!!!
item.description: What this website is about Link to heading This website is about the things I do as a programmer, gamedevloper, and AI Developer (All Unofficially) Don’t want this website to be bloated, so I made it in hugo My youtube channel Link to heading Youtube Link: Online Projects Link to heading Grid World: A simple test of basic Q learning on a grid world NEAT Algorithm Visualization: NeuroEvolution Of Augumenting Topologies Algorithm Implemented in Javascript (p5.

Configurations Link to heading About Hugo Configurations Analytics Google Analytics Google Tag Manager Fathom Analytics Plausible Analytics Goat Counter Cloudflare Matomo Application Insights Commenting Systems Disqus Commento Utterances Theme Parameters Social Icons Configuration Menu Items Configurations CSP Complete Example Front Matter Posts About Hugo Configurations Link to heading This theme supports: Analytics Google Analytics Google Tag Manager Fathom Analytics Plausible Analytics Goat Counter Cloudflare Matomo Application Insights Commenting Systems Disqus Commento Utterances Analytics Link to heading Google Analytics Link to heading Follow these steps.
